title: Chicken Masala
description: Rich and spicy Indian chicken curry cooked with aromatic spices and thick gravy.

steps.description: Heat oil and sauté chopped onions until golden brown.
Add ginger garlic paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add tomatoes and cook until soft.
Add spices and mix well.
Add chicken pieces and cook for 30–40 minutes.

title: Chicken Punjabi
description: Authentic Punjabi-style chicken curry with thick, flavorful masala.

steps.description: Marinate chicken with curd and spices for 30 minutes.
Cook onions in butter until golden.
Add tomato puree and cook well.
Add marinated chicken and cook until tender.
Simmer for 10 minutes before serving.

title: Jilebi
description: Crispy and juicy Indian sweet soaked in sugar syrup.

steps.description: Prepare smooth batter using flour and curd.
Ferment batter for 8 hours.
Prepare sugar syrup with cardamom.
Pipe batter into hot oil in spiral shape.
Soak fried jilebis in warm sugar syrup.

title: Panner Tacos
description: Soft tacos filled with spicy paneer and fresh vegetables.

steps.description: Cut paneer into cubes and sauté with spices.
Cook vegetables until slightly soft.
Fill taco shells with paneer mixture.
Top with cheese and taco sauce.
Serve hot and enjoy.
